title: Mannil Indha Lyrics Keladi Kanmani
stanzas:
ennam kanni paavaiyinri
aezhu swaramdhaan paadumo
penmai indri mannil
inbam aedhadaa
kannai moodi kanavil
vaazhum maanidaa

vennilavum ponni nadhiyum
kanniyin thunaiyindri
enna sugam ingu padaikkum
penmayil sugamandri
thandhanamum sangaththamizhum
pongidum vasandhamum
sindhivarum pongum amudham
thandhidum kumudhamum

kannimagal arugae irundhaal suvaikkum
kanniththunai izhandhaal
muzhudhum kasakkum
vizhiyinil mozhiyinil
nadaiyinil udaiyinil
adhisaya sugamtharum
anangival pirappidhudhaan

mannil indha kaadhal indri
yaarum vaazhdhal koodumo

muththumani raththinangalum
kattiya pavazhamum
koththumalar arpudhangalum
kuvindha adharamum

sitridaiyum sinna viralum
villenum puruvamum
sutrivarach cheyyum vizhiyum
sundara mozhigalum

ennivida marandhaal
edharko piravi
iththanaiyum izhandhaal
avandhaan thuravi
mudimudhal adivarai
muzhuvadhum sugamtharum
virundhugal padaiththidum
arangamum aval allavaa

mannil indha kaadhal indri
yaarum vaazhdhal koodumo

ennam kanni paavaiyinri
aezhu swaramdhaan paadumo
penmai indri mannil
inbam aedhadaa
kannai moodi kanavil
vaazhum maanidaa

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mannil Indha'?

The song explores themes of love and emotional connection, reflecting on the beauty of relationships.

In which movie does 'Mannil Indha' appear?

'Mannil Indha' is featured in the movie Keladi Kanmani.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. P. Balasubrahmanyam.

When was 'Mannil Indha' released?

The song was released on July 27, 1990.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the movie Keladi Kanmani, 'Mannil Indha' serves as a poignant reflection on love and the complexities of human emotions. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing, making it a perfect backdrop for romantic moments. It beautifully conveys the message that love is essential for a fulfilling life. The collaboration of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam's soulful voice and Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition creates an unforgettable listening experience.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mannil Indha is a timeless melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song from Keladi Kanmani resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the soothing vibes and emotional depth that make this track a classic in Tamil cinema.
stanzaMeanings: Is there anyone who can live without this love in the world?
Can a pure girl sing without her heart? What joy can there be in the world without femininity? Closing the eyes, a person lives in dreams.
The moonlight and the golden river bring comfort here, without the companionship of a maiden. The joy of femininity brings happiness, and the spring season brings forth sweetness and nourishment.
If a maiden is near, there will be sweetness. If the companion is lost, everything will be troubled. In the eyes, in the words, in the walk, in the body, there is a wonderful joy that is born.
Is there anyone who can live without this love in the world? Pearls, rubies, and the beautiful flowers are all delightful.
The gentle touch, the small fingers, the bow, and the beautiful eyes will create lovely words.
If all these are forgotten, what is the purpose of life? If they are lost, the beginning of the end will bring forth all the joys and celebrations, isn't she?
Is there anyone who can live without this love in the world?
Can a pure girl sing without her heart? What joy can there be in the world without femininity? Closing the eyes, a person lives in dreams.
